PoptheLZ.contractMessage: Commander, our liaison from {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName}, has given us our LZ.  We need to drop here and crush any resistance in the area!  Failure here will likely mean our units capture or destruction!  Plan on facing a superior enemy force with waves of firepower.  Our contact with {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} forces have indicated the possibility of 3rd party interlopers as well as extensive comms trafic from military units near our LZ!

HarrassTheEnemy1.contractMessage: We have an optional harassment mission from {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName}, Commander. They want us to engage the enemy to take pressure off their own operations.  Must be Black Ops because they seem to have no forces on planet of a mech or vehicle scale.

HarrassTheEnemy2.contractMessage: We have an optional harassment mission from {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName}, Commander. They want us to engage the enemy to take pressure off their own operations.  Must be Black Ops because they seem to have no forces on planet of a mech or vehicle scale.

EnemyCommanderAtLarge.contractMessage: Commander, it looks like {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} found a senior leader in the {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} force for us to take out.   Go get them and remove them from the playing field.

HarrassTheEnemy3.contractMessage: We have an optional harassment mission from {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName}, Commander. They want us to engage the enemy to take pressure off their own operations.  Must be Black Ops because they seem to have no forces on planet of a mech or vehicle scale.

ReduceEnemySupport.contractMessage: Commander, {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} is trying to run a convoy through our area of operation.  Let us sweep it up and remove those supplies and repurpose them for our own use here!  Our employeer will not hold skipping this contract against us but it will break our contract with them resulting in no final pay.

FinalSweep.contractMessage: Commander, I have found a lucrative target for us.  This is in line with the goals {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName}.  They have already granted us approval.  Sorry Commander I had to tell them we would do the mission when I brought the target to their attention.

PaymentDelivered.popupTitle: Per the letter of the contract, our role here is done Commander, we can ship out or continue ops under new contracts.
PaymentDelivered.popupMessage: Our payment was just delivered, Commander.  {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} is overall happy with our performance. Oh, and they sent a couple bottles of the local flavor for us to enjoy, I'm sure it's "wonderful".
